articles.title: Spain's Pedro Sánchez hits back at Trump threat to sever trade saying 'no to war'
articles.summary: Spain's prime minister delivers a strong rebuttal to US President Donald Trump's threat to end trade with his country.

articles.title: Greek court upholds criminal organisation verdict on neo-Nazi Golden Dawn
articles.summary: The party's founder Nikos Mihaloliakos and other officials are again found guilty, almost six years after an original trial.

articles.title: Higher tariffs likely this week, says US Treasury
articles.summary: Scott Bessent says that "likely sometime this week" the US will increase its global tariff on imports from the existing 10%.

articles.title: South Africa's long-serving former defence minister and former Robben Island prisoner dies
articles.summary: Mosiuoa Lekota was imprisoned with former South African President Nelson Mandela on Robben Island.

articles.title: Israel tells people in large parts of southern Lebanon to leave ahead of attacks

articles.summary: NCPC say the measure is necessary to prioritise the "safety and comfort" of Nigerian pilgrims.

articles.title: Nigerian doctors suspended over death of author Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie's son

articles.summary: Washington says the two countries are combatting 'designated terrorist organisations' in Ecuador.

articles.title: US Senate to vote on Trump's war powers as Iran conflict continues
articles.summary: The measure, which is not expected to pass, would require the withdrawal of US forces from the operation until approved by Congress.
